user.title: Sinilink XY-WFTX
user.description: Add a Sinilink thermostat. Choose how to find the device.

mqtt.title: MQTT broker (optional)
mqtt.description: Enter the address of the local MQTT broker the device connects to. This enables write control (relay, temps, LED). Leave blank for read-only monitoring.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device on UDP/1024.
error.invalid_response: Device replied but the response could not be parsed.
error.mac_mismatch: The device replied with a different MAC than entered.
error.discovery_failed: Broadcast discovery failed on this network.
error.no_devices_found: No Sinilink devices replied to the broadcast.
error.mqtt_cannot_connect: Could not connect to the MQTT broker.
